description: Add USD support with KZT conversion using National Bank of Kazakhstan exchange rates.

userStories.title: Add exchange rate domain contracts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want exchange-rate repository contracts and conversion use cases so that the app can convert between KZT and USD consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: domain layer contains ExchangeRateRepository contract for loading/storing USD-KZT rate
domain layer contains GetUsdKztRateUseCase and ConvertAmountUseCase
ConvertAmountUseCase supports both KZT->USD and USD->KZT conversion with deterministic rounding strategy
./gradlew compileDebugKotlin passes
userStories.notes: Create this in a domain module that already holds cross-feature business logic (prefer domain:statistics or new minimal domain subpackage if existing module structure supports it). Follow existing use case style from domain/transactions and domain/accounts. Keep Android dependencies out of domain.

userStories.title: Implement NBK rate data pipeline
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to fetch USD-KZT rate from NBK and cache it locally so that conversion works offline with last known rate.
acceptanceCriteria: data layer has NBK remote data source that parses official USD to KZT rate response
local cache stores rate value and fetchedAt timestamp
ExchangeRateRepositoryImpl uses remote-first with fallback to last cached rate on network failure
DI wiring provides ExchangeRateRepository implementation
./gradlew compileDebugKotlin passes
userStories.notes: Use existing project network/parsing patterns from core/parser and data modules. Persist cache in existing local storage approach (DataStore preferred for single rate record). Add clear mapper/model boundaries. Keep source marker (NBK) optional but ready for future providers.

userStories.title: Add settings controls for base currency
userStories.description: As a user, I want to choose KZT or USD as my display currency and manually refresh the exchange rate.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings screen has base currency selector with KZT and USD
Settings screen shows current USD/KZT rate and last update time
Settings screen provides manual refresh action that updates rate through repository
user preference for base currency is persisted and restored
./gradlew compileDebugKotlin passes
userStories.notes: Update presentation:settings and core:datastore UserPreferences. Follow existing settings item composition patterns in SettingsScreen.kt and SettingsViewModel patterns if present. Keep texts in resources if that pattern already exists in module.

userStories.title: Use converted currency in transactions overview
userStories.description: As a user, I want transaction totals to be shown in my selected base currency so that I can read finances consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Transaction list summary cards use selected base currency from settings
When account currency differs from base currency, totals are converted using latest available rate
If rate is unavailable, UI falls back safely to source currency without crash
Transaction list state exposes display currency and conversion status flags
./gradlew compileDebugKotlin passes
userStories.notes: Implement in presentation:transactions with minimal UI change, reusing existing currency string plumbing in TransactionListState/ViewModel and core/ui cards. Avoid changing Room schema in this iteration.

userStories.title: Cover conversion logic with unit tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for conversion and rate fallback behavior so that USD support is safe to evolve.
acceptanceCriteria: unit tests cover ConvertAmountUseCase for both directions and rounding
unit tests cover repository fallback behavior (remote success, remote failure with cache, empty cache)
at least one ViewModel-level test validates selected base currency affects displayed totals
./gradlew compileDebugKotlin passes
userStories.notes: Follow existing test style in core/parser tests and app screenshot/unit tests. Prefer pure unit tests with fakes over instrumentation.
